   555: def run_v_pbgd(
   556:     seed: int,
   557:     net_name: str,
   558:     strategy: HypercleanStrategy,
   559:     output_dir: Path,
   560:     label: str,
   561:     device: torch.device,
   562: ) -> dict[str, float]:
   563:     train, val, test = load_hyperclean_splits(seed, device)
   564:     model = make_model(net_name, device)
   565:     x = torch.zeros(train.data.shape[0], device=device, requires_grad=True)
   566:     y_opt = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=strategy.lry)
   567:     x_opt = torch.optim.SGD([x], lr=strategy.lrx)
   568: 
   569:     if strategy.gamma_init > strategy.gamma_max:
   570:         gamma_max = strategy.gamma_init
   571:     else:
   572:         gamma_max = strategy.gamma_max
   573:     gamma = strategy.gamma_init
   574:     gamma_step = (gamma_max - strategy.gamma_init) / strategy.gamma_argmax_step
   575: 
   576:     net_inner = make_model(net_name, device)
   577:     net_inner.load_state_dict(model.state_dict())
   578:     net_inner.train()
   579:     inner_opt = torch.optim.SGD(net_inner.parameters(), lr=strategy.lr_inner)
   580: 
   581:     best_accuracy: HypercleanEval | None = None
   582:     best_f1: HypercleanEval | None = None
   583:     start_time = time.perf_counter()
   584: 
   585:     for step in range(strategy.outer_itr):
   586:         model.train()
   587:         with torch.no_grad():
   588:             sigx = torch.sigmoid(x)
   589: 
   590:         iter_start = time.perf_counter()
   591:         for _ in range(strategy.inner_itr):
   592:             inner_opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
   593:             logits_inner = net_inner(train.data)
   594:             ce_inner = F.cross_entropy(logits_inner, train.dirty_target, reduction='none')
   595:             inner_loss = (sigx * ce_inner).mean() + strategy.reg * sum_squared_norm(net_inner.parameters())
   596:             inner_loss.backward()
   597:             inner_opt.step()
   598: 
   599:         y_opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
   600:         x_opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
   601: 
   602:         logits_val = model(val.data)
   603:         logits_train = model(train.data)
   604:         fy = F.cross_entropy(logits_val, val.clean_target)
   605:         ce_train = F.cross_entropy(logits_train, train.dirty_target, reduction='none')
   606:         gxy = (torch.sigmoid(x) * ce_train).mean() + strategy.reg * sum_squared_norm(model.parameters())
   607:         ce_inner_eval = F.cross_entropy(net_inner(train.data), train.dirty_target, reduction='none').detach()
   608:         vx = (torch.sigmoid(x) * ce_inner_eval).mean() + strategy.reg * sum_squared_norm(net_inner.parameters()).detach()
   609: 
   610:         lr_decay = min(1.0 / (gamma + 1e-8), 1.0)
   611:         objective = lr_decay * (fy + gamma * (gxy - vx))
   612:         objective.backward()
   613:         x_opt.step()
   614:         y_opt.step()
   615:         gamma = min(gamma_max, gamma + gamma_step)
   616:         iter_time = time.perf_counter() - iter_start
   617: 
   618:         if step % strategy.eval_interval == 0:
   619:             model.eval()
   620:             with torch.no_grad():
   621:                 logits_test = model(test.data)
   622:                 test_accuracy = compute_accuracy(logits_test, test.clean_target)
   623:                 precision, recall, f1_score = compute_cleaner_metrics(x, train.clean, train.rho)
   624:                 current = make_eval_record(
   625:                     step=step,
   626:                     train_loss=gxy,
   627:                     val_loss=fy,
   628:                     test_accuracy=test_accuracy,
   629:                     f1_score=f1_score,
   630:                     cleaner_precision=precision,
   631:                     cleaner_recall=recall,
   632:                     aux_value=gxy - vx,
   633:                     runtime_sec=time.perf_counter() - start_time,
   634:                 )
   635:                 best_accuracy = update_best_by_accuracy(best_accuracy, current)
   636:                 best_f1 = update_best_by_f1(best_f1, current)
   637:                 print(
   638:                     'TRAIN_METRICS '
   639:                     f'step={step} train_loss={current.train_loss:.6f} val_loss={current.val_loss:.6f} '
   640:                     f'test_accuracy={current.test_accuracy:.3f} f1_score={current.f1_score:.3f} '
   641:                     f'cleaner_precision={current.cleaner_precision:.6f} cleaner_recall={current.cleaner_recall:.6f} '
   642:                     f'penalty_gap={current.aux_value:.6f} iter_time={iter_time:.6f}',
   643:                     flush=True,
   644:                 )
   645: 
   646:     if best_accuracy is None or best_f1 is None:
   647:         raise RuntimeError('V-PBGD did not emit any evaluation records.')
   648:     total_runtime = time.perf_counter() - start_time
   649:     metrics = summarize_hyperclean_metrics(best_accuracy, best_f1, total_runtime)
   650:     print(
   651:         'FINAL_METRICS ' + ' '.join(
   652:             f'{key}={value:.6f}' if isinstance(value, float) else f'{key}={value}'
   653:             for key, value in metrics.items()
   654:         ),
   655:         flush=True,
   656:     )
   657:     write_json(output_dir / f'{label}_metrics.json', metrics)
   658:     return metrics
   659:

   661: def run_g_pbgd(
   662:     seed: int,
   663:     net_name: str,
   664:     strategy: HypercleanStrategy,
   665:     output_dir: Path,
   666:     label: str,
   667:     device: torch.device,
   668: ) -> dict[str, float]:
   669:     train, val, test = load_hyperclean_splits(seed, device)
   670:     model = make_model(net_name, device)
   671:     x = torch.zeros(train.data.shape[0], device=device, requires_grad=True)
   672:     y_opt = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=strategy.lry)
   673:     x_opt = torch.optim.SGD([x], lr=strategy.lrx)
   674: 
   675:     if strategy.gamma_init > strategy.gamma_max:
   676:         gamma_max = strategy.gamma_init
   677:     else:
   678:         gamma_max = strategy.gamma_max
   679:     gamma = strategy.gamma_init
   680:     gamma_step = (gamma_max - strategy.gamma_init) / strategy.gamma_argmax_step
   681: 
   682:     best_accuracy: HypercleanEval | None = None
   683:     best_f1: HypercleanEval | None = None
   684:     start_time = time.perf_counter()
   685: 
   686:     for step in range(strategy.outer_itr):
   687:         model.train()
   688:         iter_start = time.perf_counter()
   689:         y_opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
   690:         x_opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
   691: 
   692:         logits_val = model(val.data)
   693:         logits_train = model(train.data)
   694:         fy = F.cross_entropy(logits_val, val.clean_target)
   695:         ce_train = F.cross_entropy(logits_train, train.dirty_target, reduction='none')
   696:         gxy = (torch.sigmoid(x) * ce_train).mean() + strategy.reg * sum_squared_norm(model.parameters())
   697:         dgdy = torch.autograd.grad(gxy, tuple(model.parameters()), create_graph=True)
   698:         dgdy_norm = torch.sqrt(sum_squared_norm(dgdy) + 1e-12)
   699: 
   700:         lr_decay = min(1.0 / (gamma + 1e-8), 1.0)
   701:         objective = lr_decay * (fy + 0.5 * gamma * sum_squared_norm(dgdy))
   702:         objective.backward()
   703:         x_opt.step()
   704:         y_opt.step()
   705:         gamma = min(gamma_max, gamma + gamma_step)
   706:         iter_time = time.perf_counter() - iter_start
   707: 
   708:         if step % strategy.eval_interval == 0:
   709:             model.eval()
   710:             with torch.no_grad():
   711:                 logits_test = model(test.data)
   712:                 test_accuracy = compute_accuracy(logits_test, test.clean_target)
   713:                 precision, recall, f1_score = compute_cleaner_metrics(x, train.clean, train.rho)
   714:                 current = make_eval_record(
   715:                     step=step,
   716:                     train_loss=gxy,
   717:                     val_loss=fy,
   718:                     test_accuracy=test_accuracy,
   719:                     f1_score=f1_score,
   720:                     cleaner_precision=precision,
   721:                     cleaner_recall=recall,
   722:                     aux_value=dgdy_norm,
   723:                     runtime_sec=time.perf_counter() - start_time,
   724:                 )
   725:                 best_accuracy = update_best_by_accuracy(best_accuracy, current)
   726:                 best_f1 = update_best_by_f1(best_f1, current)
   727:                 print(
   728:                     'TRAIN_METRICS '
   729:                     f'step={step} train_loss={current.train_loss:.6f} val_loss={current.val_loss:.6f} '
   730:                     f'test_accuracy={current.test_accuracy:.3f} f1_score={current.f1_score:.3f} '
   731:                     f'cleaner_precision={current.cleaner_precision:.6f} cleaner_recall={current.cleaner_recall:.6f} '
   732:                     f'grad_penalty={current.aux_value:.6f} iter_time={iter_time:.6f}',
   733:                     flush=True,
   734:                 )
   735: 
   736:     if best_accuracy is None or best_f1 is None:
   737:         raise RuntimeError('G-PBGD did not emit any evaluation records.')
   738:     total_runtime = time.perf_counter() - start_time
   739:     metrics = summarize_hyperclean_metrics(best_accuracy, best_f1, total_runtime)
   740:     print(
   741:         'FINAL_METRICS ' + ' '.join(
   742:             f'{key}={value:.6f}' if isinstance(value, float) else f'{key}={value}'
   743:             for key, value in metrics.items()
   744:         ),
   745:         flush=True,
   746:     )
   747:     write_json(output_dir / f'{label}_metrics.json', metrics)
   748:     return metrics

   751: def run_rhg_family(
   752:     seed: int,
   753:     net_name: str,
   754:     strategy: HypercleanStrategy,
   755:     output_dir: Path,
   756:     label: str,
   757:     device: torch.device,
   758: ) -> dict[str, float]:
   759:     train, val, test = load_hyperclean_splits(seed, device)
   760:     x = torch.zeros(train.data.shape[0], device=device, requires_grad=True)
   761:     x_opt = torch.optim.SGD([x], lr=strategy.lr)
   762: 
   763:     def fp_map(params: list[torch.Tensor], hparams: list[torch.Tensor], dataset: HypercleanSplit = train) -> list[torch.Tensor]:
   764:         x_param = hparams[0]
   765:         logits = yforward(params, dataset.data, net_name)
   766:         loss = (torch.sigmoid(x_param) * F.cross_entropy(logits, dataset.dirty_target, reduction='none')).mean()
   767:         loss = loss + strategy.reg * sum_squared_norm(params)
   768:         grads = torch.autograd.grad(loss, params, create_graph=True)
   769:         return [param - strategy.lr_inner * grad for param, grad in zip(params, grads)]
   770: 
   771:     def val_loss(params: list[torch.Tensor], hparams: list[torch.Tensor], dataset: HypercleanSplit = val) -> torch.Tensor:
   772:         logits = yforward(params, dataset.data, net_name)
   773:         return F.cross_entropy(logits, dataset.clean_target)
   774: 
   775:     def fresh_params() -> list[torch.Tensor]:
